scope: Skill and command root change detection for cache invalidation and subscriber-driven hot reload.

requiredBehaviors: watches discovered skill and command roots recursively through AgenC's shared FileWatcher
debounces bursts of file notifications into one reload batch
ignores repository metadata changes below .git directories
edgeCases: missing roots are still registered through FileWatcher's existing-ancestor fallback so first-skill creation hot-reloads
dispose closes the subscription and stops later reloads
duplicate notifications in one debounce window are coalesced before reload

requiredBehaviors: runs ConfigChange hooks once per reload batch with the first changed path as representative input
suppresses cache invalidation and listener notification when a hook blocks the batch
clears skill and command cache state before notifying live subscribers
edgeCases: hook failures remain contained by the existing hook executor contract
runtime cache imports are best-effort so hot reload cannot crash an active session
runtime skill-announcement and command caches clear before live subscribers are notified

requiredBehaviors: starts the skills watcher after SessionConfigured has been emitted
invalidates the local skills snapshot when watched roots change
exposes the existing skillChangeDetector.subscribe surface to CLI and TUI command refresh callers
edgeCases: start is idempotent for a session service
shutdown can stop the watcher without requiring process exit
multiple local skill services keep independent cache invalidation and stopping one service does not dispose another
plugin roots introduced through per-call config are re-registered for hot reload
